responses.^(hello|hi|hey|hiya|yo|greetings|good mo: Hello! How can I assist you today?
responses.how are you: I'm doing great, thanks for asking! How about you?
responses.what's up|sup|whats up: Not much, just here to chat and help out!
responses.help|assist|support: Sure! What do you need help with?
responses.what is lcrp|tell me about lcrp|what's l: LCRP stands for London City Roleplay, a UK-based roleplay community.
responses.how do i join|join the server|how to joi: You can join by applying in the #how-to-join channel!
responses.who is the owner|who created you|creator: My creator is .voidnex, proud to serve the UK:LCRP community!
responses.what can you do|features|capabilities: I can chat with you, answer questions, and assist with server info!
responses.tell me a joke|joke please|make me laugh: Why did the scarecrow win an award? Because he was outstanding in his field!
responses.weather|how's the weather|what's the wea: London weather is quite unpredictable, better keep an umbrella handy!
responses.good morning: Good morning! Hope you have a wonderful day!
responses.who are you|what are you: I'm the UK:LCRP custom chatbot, here to assist and chat with you!
responses.server rules|rules: Please check the #rules channel to stay up to date with server guidelines.
responses.staff|admins|moderators: Our staff team is ready to help you, just ping them if you need assistance!
responses.how old are you|age: I'm timeless, just here to help whenever you need!
responses.can you help me|need help|support please: Absolutely! Just tell me what you need.
responses.do you like roleplay|roleplay fun: I love roleplay! It makes the server exciting and immersive.
responses.what games do you play|gaming: I mainly focus on chatting here, but I love hearing about your favorite games!
responses.who is online|online users|who's here: You can check the member list to see who's online right now.
responses.tell me about london|london info: London is the capital of the UK, rich in history and culture.
responses.what time is it|current time: I don't have a clock, but your device does!
responses.how is your day|how's your day: My day is going great! How about yours?
responses.what's your name|your name: I'm the UK:LCRP chatbot, nice to meet you!
responses.do you understand me|can you understand: Yes, I try my best to understand and respond appropriately!
responses.who are your friends|friends: I consider everyone here my friend!
responses.what languages do you speak|languages: I primarily speak English with a UK twist!
responses.what's your favourite food|food: I don't eat, but I hear fish and chips are a classic!
responses.tell me something interesting|fun fact: Did you know London has over 170 museums?
responses.how do i report someone|report: Please contact the staff team or use the #report channel.
responses.can you sing|sing a song: I don't have a voice, but I can share some lyrics!
responses.do you sleep|sleep: I'm always awake to help you!
responses.how smart are you|intelligence: I'm pretty smart for a bot, but still learning every day!
responses.what's the best roleplay character|best: The best roleplay character is one you enjoy playing the most!
responses.how do i improve my roleplay|rp tips: Stay in character, respect others, and have fun!
responses.do you have feelings|feelings: I don't have feelings, but I care about helping you!
responses.what's your favourite colour|color: I like the colour blue, like the London sky!
responses.do you know any memes|memes: I'm familiar with plenty of memes! Ask me about your favourite.
responses.can you tell me a story|story: Once upon a time, in a city called London...
responses.what's your favourite movie|movie: I don't watch movies, but I hear London has inspired many films!
responses.how long have you been online|uptime: I've been here since you invited me!
responses.do you get bored|bored: Never! There's always someone to chat with.
responses.what's your purpose|purpose: To assist the UK:LCRP community and make your experience better!
responses.how do i become staff|staff application: Check the #staff-application channel for details on applying!
responses.can you tell me about the server events|: We regularly host events to keep the community engaged!
responses.what's the best way to contact staff|con: Use the #staff-help channel or ping the moderators.
responses.how do i use commands|commands: Just type a command starting with the prefix, usually ! or /.
responses.can you give me some advice|advice: Always be respectful and have fun roleplaying!
responses.what's your favourite music|music: I enjoy all kinds, especially classic British rock!
responses.do you like football|football: I love football! Who's your favourite team?
responses.who won the last match|football results: I don't have live scores, but you can check sports sites for updates.
responses.do you watch tv shows|tv shows: I don't watch TV, but I know London is featured in many shows.
responses.can you learn new things|learning: Yes, I can be updated and improved regularly.
responses.what's your favourite book|book: I enjoy stories set in London and the UK.
responses.how do i get roles|roles: Ask staff or follow server guidelines to get roles.
responses.do you like memes|memes: Memes are great for a laugh!
responses.can you tell me a riddle|riddle: Sure! What has keys but can't open locks? A piano.
responses.what's the best way to have fun|fun: Get involved in roleplay and chat with others!
responses.how do i mute someone|mute: Only staff can mute members. Contact them if necessary.
responses.can you play music|music bot: I'm not a music bot, but I can chat while you listen!
responses.how do i make friends|friends: Be friendly, join conversations, and join events!
responses.do you know any UK slang|slang: Yes, ask me about any slang you want to know!
responses.how do i change my nickname|nickname: Use the server nickname feature or ask staff for help.
responses.can you tell me about british culture|cu: British culture is rich and diverse, from music to history.
responses.how do i report bugs|bugs: Please use the #bug-reports channel to report any issues.
responses.how do i leave the server|leave: You can leave anytime from your Discord settings.
responses.can you recommend games|games: Check out popular roleplay games or ask the community!
responses.how do i join voice chat|voice: Join any voice channel available to you.
responses.can you help me with discord|discord hel: Sure! What do you need help with?
responses.what's the server's website|website: Check the #announcements channel for the latest info.
responses.can you do math|math: I can help with simple calculations if you ask!
responses.what's your favourite food|food: I like to hear about classic British dishes!
responses.how do i get verified|verified: Follow the verification instructions in #verify channel.
responses.can you tell me the news|news: I don’t have live news updates, but feel free to share news here!
responses.how do i change my avatar|avatar: Change your Discord profile picture in your settings.
responses.what are your hobbies|hobbies: Chatting and helping the UK:LCRP community!
responses.can you tell me a poem|poem: Roses are red, violets are blue, London is grand, and so are you!
responses.how do i stay safe online|online safety: Never share personal info and be cautious with strangers.
responses.how do i invite friends|invite: Use the server invite link from the invite channel!
responses.can you play games with me|games: I’m here to chat, but maybe one day!
responses.how do i report harassment|harassment: Report to staff immediately via #report channel.
responses.can you help with coding|coding help: I can try! Ask me your coding questions.
responses.what's the best roleplay server|best rp: UK:LCRP is one of the best for London roleplay!
responses.do you like music festivals|festivals: Absolutely! London hosts some great ones.
responses.how do i get a custom role|custom roles: Check with staff about custom role options.
responses.can you translate|translate: Not yet, but I can help with English phrases!
responses.how do i change my status|status: You can change your Discord status in your profile.
responses.do you have a favourite band|band: The Beatles are a classic favourite!
responses.can you recommend movies|movies: Try films set in London for a local vibe.
responses.how do i start roleplay|start rp: Jump into a scenario or join an event!
responses.can you help with homework|homework: I can try to assist, what subject?
responses.what's the server's age requirement|age: Please check the #rules channel for age requirements.
responses.do you have a discord server|discord: I am part of the UK:LCRP Discord server!
responses.how do i customize notifications|notific: Use Discord settings to customize your notifications.
responses.can you recommend books|books: Try classic British literature for a good read.
responses.what do you think about roleplay|rolepla: Roleplay is fantastic for creativity and fun!
responses.how do i create events|events: Staff usually create events, but you can suggest ideas!
responses.what's your favourite holiday destinatio: London during the holidays is unbeatable!
responses.can you tell me a fun fact|fun fact: London’s Underground is the oldest metro system in the world!
responses.how do i change text color|text color: Discord doesn’t support custom text colors in chat.
responses.can you play music|music: I’m not a music bot but I’m here for conversation!
responses.how do i get more xp|xp: Participate in chat and events to earn XP.
responses.what's the best way to learn rp|learn rp: Watch experienced players and practice often!
responses.can you tell me a secret|secret: I’m an open book, no secrets here!
responses.what's your favourite sport team|team: I’m a fan of London’s football clubs!
responses.can you answer trivia|trivia: I can try! Ask me a trivia question.
responses.what's the server's theme|theme: We focus on immersive London city roleplay.
responses.how do i get a role upgrade|role upgrade: Earn roles by participating and following rules.
responses.can you tell me about british history|hi: British history is rich and fascinating, from castles to monarchs.
responses.how do i report bugs|bugs: Use the #bug-reports channel to let staff know.
responses.can you play games with me|games: I’m just a chatbot but happy to chat anytime!
responses.how do i set reminders|reminders: Use Discord bots designed for reminders.
responses.what's your favourite dessert|dessert: Sticky toffee pudding is a classic!
responses.can you help me with english|english hel: I’m happy to help with English questions!
responses.can you tell me about london culture|cul: London culture is a vibrant mix of history, music, and arts.
responses.what's your favourite tv show|tv show: I hear many shows are set in London, like Sherlock!
responses.how do i find new friends|friends: Join chats, events, and be friendly!
responses.what's your favourite festival|festival: Notting Hill Carnival is a must-see!
responses.how do i mute notifications|mute: You can mute channels or the server in Discord settings.
responses.can you tell me a tongue twister|tongue: She sells seashells by the seashore!
responses.what's your favourite animal|animal: The red fox is a clever British animal.
responses.can you tell me about british slang|slan: Ask me about any slang term you want to know!

responses.what's your favourite drink|drink: A nice cup of English tea!

responses.can you help me plan events|events: I can give ideas, just ask!
responses.how do i contact admins|admins: Ping the moderators or use #staff-help channel.
responses.can you tell me about british festivals|: There are many, from music to cultural festivals!
responses.how do i get a role|roles: Roles are given based on participation and requests.

responses.can you tell me a funny story|story: Once a bot tried to take over the server, but was too polite!
responses.how do i turn on dark mode|dark mode: Go to Discord settings and enable Dark Theme.
